title: Quest 36890 Fast Boil Glass Kettle / 1.7 Litre Capacity – 7 Cups/Strix Controller/Spout Filter/Overheat Protection/Durable Glass with Water Level Indicators / 3000W
features: CLEAR GLASS KETTLE – Quickly make cups of tea, coffee and more with this Fast Boil Kettle! It has a capacity of 1.7 litres, making it perfect for family homes or offices as it can quickly boil up to 7 cups worth of water. Its glass exterior makes boiling progress visible at all times, and is strong & easy to clean, and the kettle’s material is BPA free.

RAPID BOIL TECHNOLOGY – With up to 3000W of power, this powerful kettle boils half a litre of water in just one minute, allowing you to quickly enjoy any hot drinks. Its design ensures that the heating element is concealed, and you can ensure that you boil the exact amount of water you need thanks to the visible water level indicators on the glass.

SAFE & CLEAN – The kettle is fitted with a spout filter, which can be removed in order to clean it. The lid features a safe lock, and the strong borosilicate glass won’t weaken with use over time. Once the kettle has finished boiling, it will automatically be switched off by the built-in Strix controller to prevent overheating, and its V-shaped spout will prevent any drip residue.

EASY TO USE – Boiling the kettle is simple – just flick the switch on to begin heating the water inside. You can easily tell if the kettle is active thanks to the blue LED indicator included, which also illuminates the water inside. Accessing the kettle is easy from any angle as it rotates 360 degrees on its base, and the base also features built-in cord storage to save space.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Efficient Rapid Boil Technology 1.7 Litre Glass Kettle This Rapid Boil Glass Kettle allows you to boil up to 7 cups of hot water in no time at all. Its glass exterior is fully transparent, allowing you to see the water inside and measure its capacity via the helpful water indicators printed on the glass. It is designed with safety and cleanliness in mind, featuring a reliable Strix controlled base, a securely locked lid to prevent spillage, and a washable spout filter. Previous page LED Light Indicators When the kettle is in use, the water & the switch light up in a blue colour via the included LEDs. Push Button Lid The kettle can easily be refilled by pressing the button on the handle to unlock the lid. Spout Filter The kettle is fitted with a removable, washable spout filter to ensure cleanliness. Anti-Drip Spout The V-shaped spout is designed to prevent any drip residue from forming after water is boiled. Water Level Indicators Always boil the exact amount of water you need using the water level indicators on the glass. Next page 1 LED Light Indicators 2 Push Button Lid 3 Spout Filter 4 Anti-Drip Spout 5 Water Level Indicators

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti Scale Mesh Filter, Automatic Shut-Off, Heat Resistant Handle, Rapid Boil, Water Level Indicator
